title: Mesembryanthemum iteratum
intro: Mesembryanthemum iteratum, commonly known as the Namaqua daisy, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aizoaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Mesembryanthemum iteratum include flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Mesembryanthemum iteratum is often prepared as a tincture or infused oil, which can be used topically to alleviate skin conditions or internally to support overall health and well-being.
